target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely consumed by fire with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are charred and non-functional; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely consumed by fire with no discernible structural integrity; all major components are charred and fused together; no repairable parts visible.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely charred with no intact structural components; metal frame is twisted and fused; no discernible operational parts remain.

summary: Three military equipment targets are confirmed destroyed, each exhibiting complete combustion with no discernible structural or functional integrity. The scene depicts a road in a mountainous area littered with the charred remains of multiple vehicles, with armed personnel standing nearby. The confirmed destruction of all assessed targets indicates a complete loss of operational capability for the affected equipment.
